notes: Updates now install silently in the background when iRacing is closed, so there is no more Install now pop-up. Sessions also record which Capture version recorded them.
notas: As atualizacoes agora se instalam em segundo plano quando o iRacing esta fechado, entao acabou o pop-up Install now. As sessoes tambem passam a registrar com qual versao do Capture foram gravadas.
